case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. KHOSROW R BOUSHERI et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-01-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK AS TO DEFENDANT BOUSHERI, KHOSROW R DOES 1-100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-06-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-04-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-22-2008

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-01-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-06-2008 CONTINUED TO SEP-05-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
